The PR updates the maturity scorecard generator, generated scorecard docs/CSS, and renderer tests to show one quality-plus-completeness headline score while keeping coverage as supporting metadata and rejecting failed or blocked evidence.

PR surface: Tests +103, Docs -19, Other 0. Total +84 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a generated-docs and maintainer tooling clarification, not a runtime bug report. The review compared current-main renderer behavior, PR-head generated output, related tests, and the split workflow PR.

target.title: docs: clarify maturity scorecard scoring
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The maturity scorecard rendered Coverage as a headline score beside Quality and Completeness, which made coverage look like an input to maturity scoring.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Render one headline `Maturity score` from Quality + Completeness only.
- Keep Coverage, Quality, and Completeness visible in the scorecard metadata and surface/category tables.
- Preserve the existing rendered coverage values while clarifying that coverage is not part of the maturity score.
- Document the goal of keeping end-to-end coverage above 90% for mature Stable-or-better features over time.
- Reject failed or blocked evidence unconditionally before rendering generated maturity docs.
- Keep the single-card summary layout full-width and keep the renderer test fixture inside the core test boundary.

The workflow default/profile switch to `all` moved to #96595.

## User Impact

Readers now see that OpenClaw maturity is scored from quality and completeness, while coverage remains visible as supporting evidence and a long-term E2E coverage target.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/render-maturity-docs.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.full-core-support-boundary.config.ts test/extension-test-boundary.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/qa/render-maturity-docs.ts test/scripts/render-maturity-docs.test.ts`
- `pnpm maturity:check`
- `pnpm format:docs:check`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
